reviews.review_title: An amazing co op experience but needs a
reviews.review_description:
I am playing through the entire campaign with my buddy, and we are having the absolute best time. The game is incredibly fun, the action is non stop, and the graphics look fantastic on the Quest 3. Plus, since I am using the BoboVR strap, we can easily play for long time, shoot zombies without any comfort issues.

There is just one annoying problem that the developers need to address. In Chapter 2, right after the bridge, there is a frustrating bug where the cars do not open at all. It has not been fixed yet and it definitely ruins the momentum when you are in the middle of the action.
Other than that specific glitch, the game is super enjoyable and highly recommended!

I tied to play with my friend and I keep saying error 10050 and to fix the connection all of it was good but then I figured out you can’t change the version it won’t let you so you can’t play multiplayer and you can’t change the version they need to fix this.

Overall it’s a great game, the graphics are good and so are the game mechanics but there are a few problems. First of all: The punching mechanics don’t do damage, it only pushes them away. Second of all: The games too short; I played for a roughly estimated day and a half and the game was over with. The storyline felt rushed and every new section of the game was over in just a few minutes.

reviews.review_title: Very very very very good and zombie are

reviews.review_description:
*** Do not have / Never played AS2 ***

 This is by far one of the best games you can pick up for Quest 2/3s & 3. If the whole magic and street wizardry thing or endless neon cyber ninja trash rehash is not your cup of tea.. Enter Arizona Sunshine Remake. I bought the original on PC and played it on an Oculus CV1. After 10 minutes with teleport and no smooth movement options, I straight up walked away for years. Teleport is an abomination to VR, Just my opinion. 

   Flash forward a few years and I get myself a quest 3, Head back into my library as I had a quest 2 for a very short period of time, bought a few games but ultimately had to walk away due to life. I noticed the original Arizona Sunshine now available for my quest 3. I play it and I beat it, wanting more I see the remake and pick it up on sale as I am not a rich man, lots of family and this is my only source of gaming nowadays as I've given up consoles and PC gaming for good. 

   First things first I love the voice acting through the game, it reminds me of Duke nukem of which I beat them all. "Hail to the king baby" I love the gunplay, most of the level design and the mechanics. The whole thing just works so well. I love the variety of zombies and I'm not a zombie shooter type of person I honestly never liked zombie games to be truthful They felt cheap and too easy to me. Though not an infinite array of zombies I find it fun and unique to be hunted down by what feels like an undead Walmart mob. 

   There is a good variety of guns and they are all fun to play with. The ability to use hand weapons like hatchets and crowbars against them is not my personal cup of tea but I do enjoy it every once in a while when I'm in a pinch. Grenades are fun, I found it odd though that there was no dynamite? Especially in the mine. I looked everywhere for a single stick or even a bundle unfortunately none was found.
Seems like a real no-brainer if you're going to give me a Zippo lighter and cigarettes, Moltov cocktails... No dynamite though.

  I wish there was more game and what I mean by that is, even with the two DLCs included in the remake I'm still hungry for more. I've now beat the game three times in a row most likely will continue to play it, and play it, and play it. Until I can afford the second one which will probably not be for some time.

   Thank you Vertigo Games, Looking forward to enjoying more of your games.

This is likely my first review ever, and looking at other reviews suprises me. I expected nothing but good reviews. This game is spectacular. Coming from physics based, high end games like bonelab and blade and sorcery, this game brings me back to the simpler times with games like superhot. With a few hours into the game, dare I say, the story has me more interested than BaS and bonelab did. The gameplay is not clunky, but perhaps that's due to me being a vr user for years. The main character is pretty funny. For being pretty much a blank slate, this guy is pretty cool, and relatable, and has one of the best voice actors in a vr game, or even a game in general. The objectives are simple, not watered down tasks that have no clear point. The missions are not complex in anyway, but for a game like this, thats what's best for it. This is one of the best shooters vr has to offer. Buy this game, do you and Freddy a favor.

I came here once, played the game, deleted a few prices, installed the game a month later, and passed the first challenge, which is why I had deleted the game before. And gradually, the game became so enjoyable for me that I bought the second version. Even though I never buy games, the game was so enjoyable that I bought the new version.

This game was probably my most favorite game that I’ve bought. It is super fun with a friend. It is also fun by yourself too. I have the first and second one. They’re both very good. I would really really love for a third fourth and fifth to come out too lol recommendation 10 out of 10 
￼

Nice remake, good atmosphere, but unfortunately for us quest 3s owners, it's either buggy as hell or just too powerful for the hardware. 

Laggy, freezing up as you go to melee zombies (and you hand and weapon hangs in midair as you retreat backwards) and even worse when a hoard arrives and there's lots on screen.

The file size is also massive, I'd say it's the same as about all 6 of my other apps combined.

Luckily I got this on the quest subscription redemption this month, so no love lost.

As a VR experience, this game is really fun! There are a few bits that could be better (like having the grip toggle works for both guns AND melee weapons as, right now, it only works with guns). Also, one really important thing to know is that the game is way pass its prime and the online side (for coop) is pretty much dead and double tapped.

This game is hands down the greatest VR game I have played ever, and I've played a LOT of VR games. The story is simple but amazing, the mechanics are extraordinary and the visuals are, for a standalone quest game? STUNNING! 

I've re-played this game twice, along with the DLC's (I don't replay games ever, thats how good it is)

This game is 100% a must buy.

The game is nice, but it has some bugs. The most serious is that in the "bridge" chapter, the cars doors won't open, even though you can hear them opening and closing, but in reality, they remain graphically closed. Then, sometimes when you lower the gun to your belt to reload, it won't reload, and you have to do it multiple times. The developers have been aware of these issues for some time, but I don't see them doing anything to fix these bugs with an update!!

I played the original on psvr1 and had a lot of fun even though it was still outdated at the time but playing this remake was amazing.
1. Manual reloading added
2. Incredible gore and physics
3. This might be better than arizona 2
4 improved on a lot of issues og arizona amd arizona 2 had
5. Amazing graphics
All of this and more the price is worth it for a 6 to 8 hour game

worst game ever. I don't have the patience to type out all the issue with this trash excuse for a game and its terrible developers 
 need 0 out of 5

First I was mad at the game because I didn't have enough bullets and I could not pass the level without doing it on the easiest mode. I didn't realize that would work so I was stuck for like 2 days lol. But then when I got past it and started getting into the game, it started just screwing up everywhere and I keep having bugs and having to restart. 

I'm dead serious this is really happening I'm not trying to troll or hate on the game because I actually like it.

reviews.review_title: Great zombie game, maybe even the best
reviews.review_description: Many reviews state that "the gun play is bad" or "the game is too buggy" well I say, SKILL ISSUE! The guns are great and feel like you're actually reloading a gun, then the bugs give it its charm. Don't believe the other reviews It's a must buy, especially if its on sale
I love this game and it’s even better in multiplayer and two DLC’s FOR FREE with multiplayer of course
Its my first completed VR game, i enjoyed it a lot.

Most frustrating game ever.  Can't... absolutely CAN'T decend ladders.  Climb down to the bottom, let go and... boom, back at the top again.  Every. Single. Time.  Takes a million tries to grab a gun or ammo.  Forget about trying to holster it again.  This games is clearly the result of Devs who don't GAS.  AVOID.
This is the best VR shooter game I’ve ever played. This game should cost $80 with how good it is, 10/10 will be replaying this game

Fred's are great
Recommend to the Walking dead fans because of the revolvers you can get and cowboy hat.

This game is just amazing! 
I played the story mode and immediately fell in love with the protagonist. Although I can say this game is slightly buggy but only in minor issues. For example, sometime car doors or trunks will not open.
This game runs surprisingly well on my 3s. If you are having lag troubles on the 3s please watch some videos on how to optimize your headset for this game.
This game also has a great amount of gameplay with a great story too. It personally has been very hard to find VR games with amazing stories like this one. There is the main story and two side DLC’s which sound like they would cost money but you can actually play them for completely free so when you buy this game you’re practically getting a 3 games in 1 combo.
Would recommend!

The movement is smooth, the gun choices are awesome, I love being able to carry multiple melee weapons and grenades and food. Catch me juggling all the way to the exit 😂
I've found a little challenge here n there and had to be mindful of which weapons I used at what time. It's fun strategizing and trying to survive.
I play on the Adventure mode and it's perfect for beginners who have a good eye but get overwhelmed easily.
You can't jump, but honestly would you be able to IRL? Me? Not really. Not the way most video games make jumps happen at least lol

The ONLY complaint I have (and it isn't even big enough to take a star) is that I can't light the cigarette/cigar with random lanterns that are on fire already and open (also can't light lanterns even tho they have a wick designed into the model) I chose not to carry the lighter and my cig is just unlit now lol still looks cool

There are a few bugs when trying to play multiplayer. The secondary person who joins constantly gets booted causing the game to reset. Also, the game is very short for the cost. You can complete it very quickly

Wow I just wow, me personally I don’t like zombie games but this game was something else it was a scary but not that scary it’s something in the middle and I highly recommend it even if you don’t like zombie games and I really likedtge sense of humor in this game

My friend jumbokiwi got me into this game and I’m glad he did it’s a good game a really good game my rating of the zombie games would have to be 

1. Telltales series

2. Saints and sinner’s

3. AZS

Goated game 10/10 would recommend
I am only giving it 4 stars due to some moments where doors and car doors bug out, visually they are open but gameplay wise they are not.

Like people have said you can get bugs early on in the game like car doors not opening and slight lag/ wonky hit detection even though I’m on the Quest 3. But other than that the gun play is good. There could’ve been more zombie varieties to spice up the gameplay. The most you get is basic mechanics like zombies with helmets take 2 shots instead of 1 and that’s about as complex as it ever gets. I also wasn’t the biggest fan of the main characters voice. He reminds me a lot of Seth Rogan which I find annoying for some reason but not a deal breaker or anything. Still a really great game though.
One of the best story lines I ever heard this vr game has one of the most best graphics I have ever seen on vr
Best zombie game Iv played

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Zombie VR Games
reviews.review_description:
Just finished this game and found it one of the best zombie games in VR. The immersive gameplay, realistic gunplay, and engaging storyline make the experience very exciting. Fighting zombies in VR feels intense and enjoyable.

However, the game is a bit short, and the price feels slightly high compared to its length. Despite that, the overall experience is awesome and very entertaining. 

Highly recommended for zombie game lovers.

Just bought the game,  played a half hour into it,  mechanics are AWFUL,  game is glitchy, car doors and trunks won't open,  to pick anything up is a nightmare,  and the reloading sucks. Why would anyone EVER need to reholster a weapon to reload?!?!  Should have taken heed to the reviews.. what a scam 💩

Add freezing and crashing to the list..

I really like this game, wish you would have more remakes. Feel like I would enjoy more areas that looks like arizona, it's such a beautiful state and has alot to offer. Scenes are beneficial to kick a little zombie but to save that sate.

reviews.review_title: i redeemed this game and fell in love
reviews.review_description: AMAZING AWESOME WONDERFUL LITERALLY BEST VR EXPERIENCE
This game is the best game I ever played
Great story, cool mechanics, overall an amazing experience to put some hours in. Some terror atmospheric moments to enjoy, good variety of weapons... best zombie game I have played on VR so far.

reviews.review_title: Best vr game ever… when it works
reviews.review_description: I love this game it’s so much fun but it glitches CONSTANTLY to the point where trunks/doors don’t open or I’ll get teleported somewhere random especially when fighting the zombies it’s almost impossible to win with how much it glitches.

reviews.review_title: OK little game but no more than that
reviews.review_description:
Fine little game, but the horde swarm before the mine entrance will make you want to rage quit. What were they thinking - there are more Freds then you have ammo. Max ammo for handguns should have been 300, not 200. Also some annoying bugs - doors that can't be opened even if you grab the doorhandle, car trunks that won't lift (luckily you can loot through the lid) and others.
Reg. comments about the game being "gorgeous" etc.: Looks like some people have not played Batman: Arkham Shadow (native Quest 3 game) or PC based VR games like  Alyx or even modded Fallout 4.

I read some of the reviews to make sure this wasn’t just me. There are times you can’t open doors to get to stuff you need. Reloading the gym sometimes doesn’t work. The zombie move fast and you’re standing there trying toto get the clip to drop and then it won’t reload. If it weren’t so buggy I’d give it 5 stars. It’s amazing otherwise.  Also I’m pretty sure the aim is off. Maybe I’m just an exceptionally bad shot but I don’t think so. It’s frustrating because I’m not sure I can finish the game.

After further play I think the company put this on Horizon plus because they didn’t want to fix all the bugs. I can’t reload fast enough, even in easy mode, to get past this level. It’s glitchy and there have been complaints long enough they have had time to address it. Not worth the space it takes up on your drive.

reviews.review_title: Muicho mucho bien this game is great🍔🍔
reviews.review_description: I played the game for the first time and its awesome and the mode where you just kill zombies is great and creative

The first game with high graphics was a very interesting experience with a team of 2 or 4 players that had a great experience with the game as well as some of the other games that I have played highly recommend it for anyone interested in playing with a group that has played before.

This game is honestly one of the greatest games iv'e ever downloaded it would only be the best game if you had a coop free roam dlc were you can be with your friend and travel all over arizona and could u add a dog to.  PLS!!!!!!!
so i had this game for a year and its good so far so ermm freddy get it on pcvr

Playing solo is great no problems, all the problems with this game comes in horde mode multiplayer. Tons of glitches where zombies disappear and then show up right in front of you and kill you, then it’ll pop up “no memory” even when you have a massive amount of memory left and it just kicks you out. “A player not responding” there is no way to bring them back into the fold or have them do anything to correct the issue, just have to kick them or they kick themselves and they can’t reenter that specific lobby without everyone restarting a new one.. “New Guns” don’t appear anywhere on the map after Wave 5 even tho it says “New guns have appeared” Two of us got to Wave 70 still no new guns or heavier weapons like grenade launchers to help with the massive influx of zombies, .. the food stops respawning after wave 5, grenades also stop respawning after wave 5 and ammo really gets sparse after wave 25.. you have to do a lot of work in game to save ammo and have to stack it outside the respawn boxes or your ammo will just disappear if left in the respawning box , they need to update this game especially for multiplayer

reviews.review_title: Very fun but has lots of co-op bugs
reviews.review_description: This was the first Arizona sunshine game I got and I thought that the game was really fun! Then I tried multiplayer and every time I joined someone they disconnected 5 min in or the game just crashed. But if you stay out of multiplayer the game is really fun and has great physics and fun weapons to use so this game is a solid 4 out of 5.

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun but way too many bugs
reviews.review_description:
I played the game on Quest 3, I paid less than 9 euros taking advantage of the bundle (i already own arizona 2), and the game + the DLCs for this price makes it absolutely worth it.

I had a lot of fun playing it, even if it shows the original came out almost 10 years ago.

Still, it's not possible that a game so successful (which means - a good amount of money) is still so buggy after all this time. Examples:

- car trunks and doors not opening when you actually open them. You hear the noise, you can pick up the stuff inside, but they don't physically open. Happened a few times

- low memory issue. Happened around 10 times.

- spawning mid air in the elevator (happened 3 times).

- AI of the zombies getting nonsensical (ignoring me and just pointing to a door, like my character was still there when i was actually running in circles around them)

We know the game is old, we know you're probably working on new titles...but show you're a serious company and fix those bugs already.

This game is 85% searching for ammo, 10% unaliving zombies, 5% searching for keys. Gets repetitive and boring. Not to mention this remake's graphics are nothing to write home about.

Edit:
I purchased Arizona Sunshine 2 after playing this game because reviews said it was a longer game. But I felt the opposite. The main campaign in Arizona Sunshine 2 felt shorter than the campaign in Remake plus the two DLCs.
Literally paid for it like 5 days ago and they bring it out on the game pass 🫣🤣 just my luck, HOWEVER!!! awesome game lots of fun 👌🏼

ignore those 12 y/os complaining, it's great! Story makes sense, zombies look good, and the voicelines help make this game better.

Must-buy for quest 3 owners, great multiplayer.

Peace!

When I first got it I was scared to death then one day I beat the first (level) with my eyes half closed then I didn't stop for 3 hours fun and very interactive zombies are not even hard to kill well when they are few and far between no problems or complaints👹

this is a great game, there were multiple parts in the game where i forgot that i was actually playing, it is extremely immersive, great controls and a great narrative i really felt like i was in a zombie apocalypse
People are flaming this cos of the 3s but I've beat both games (as2/asr) and it's not laggy at all it's an amazing game and I hope you continue the game into arazona sunshine 3

Hi is anybody else having trouble joining a private game with friends on horde mode and other side games as me and my friend have quest 2 and have always enjoyed playing but haven't been able to join each others lobby the past few weeks . Any suggestions will be much appreciated.
Thank-you
I loved the game, already bought number 2!

I was looking for a good story game for a while and I first came across walking dead: saints and sinners. But the came was too much of a horror game for my liking and then I got AZ sunshine. The graphics are great and the story even better. Considering, you get a fairly long champain, co-op, and 2 dlcs are insane. Rip to all the Freddy's a slayed along my journey. Also f*ck Emily (play thru the first dlc and you'll know why)
I do love this game. Great sense of humor and quite often makes you jump but c'mon, the number of bugs and issues in this game really really spoils it.

This is an amazing game, but I purchased based on co-op mode, which is extremely buggy. Audio doesn’t work unless an external call is made. Just base the functionality off Walkabout Mini Golf, which is perfect. I have gifted that game to many friends and as a result we have all paid for the extra avatars and levels. I wish this title was equally as user friendly. Would be very popular especially if multiple people could join campaign mode. Free money if the developers can improve
It’s not worth paying it bad
PEAK ZOMBIE GAME AND I MEAN PEAK
This game is amazing , especially the graphics and the VR immersive experience. One of the best games on my list

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ive played
reviews.review_description: This game is insane. And the story line is great, funny and engaging. Highly recommend

reviews.review_title: Please fix co-op. Please fix multiplayer
reviews.review_description:
Trying to get my girl into VR I have a Q3 she has a Q2. I start a lobby… she joins… it shows she’s in the lobby… but I can’t get her in game to save my life. It will not let her start. We rebooted both headsets. We have tried it everything… I have tried everything. This is very frustrating. I had to buy the game on two different headsets, which really sucks. HOW DO I FIX THIS FOR THE LOVE OF GOD?
PLEASE HELP!
Hard for me to give anything 5 stars after playing red matter 2, but this is close. Looks good, lots of fun, doesn't get boring.
I love the campaign and voice acting all game modes made fun and met a few friends on multiplayer
This remake needs to be rewarded, this is a massive step up and playing this story is soo good.
This game is 10/10 you should buy peak ending there is coop 😀😀😀😀😀😀😀😀😀😀😀😀😀 trust

reviews.review_title: Best zombie game I've played yet
reviews.review_description: The shooting mechanics and the scavenging to find ammo make it a really fun game.
Thi game is one of the best story games i have ever played on vr. I suggest that people who want a fun story game to play, to buy this game and the sequal.
This is my favourite new game for Quest! Very immersive and I found it hard to put down. If you like shooter, survival, zombie games then give this a try.
This was the first and so far only game I have played in the Arizona Sunshine series. Its great besides a problem with loading into the Refinery. If you have Horizon+ then get this game.
I liked this game the story is good and my only  Complaint￼ is it’s not long enough

reviews.review_title: favorite game way better then S&S
reviews.review_description: This is a game I actually enjoy, exploring is super fun in this game cause it serves an actual purpose to find items as for the fighting and gore I love it story amazing and multiplayer is so much more fun I can’t wait until my headset is fully charged for this awesome gameplay and experience
I love the game

reviews.review_description: I NEED THE 3RD ONE ITS MY FAV GAME NOW PLEASE JUST MAKE LIKE 6 MORE😂

Loved it.  

Great game and can't wait to play Arizona Sunshine 2.

My cousin and i just beat this game! if i could give it a 10 star review i would! downloading number 2 now 🙃

The game is awesome! Great zombie horror. Strongly recommend!
